case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. THERESA MAXIE et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MAXIE, THERESA HEARING SET FOR DEC-22-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT THERESA MAXIE'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED ON NOVEMBER 23, 2010. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY, REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR # 5220 301/REQ

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON DEC-22-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT THERESA MAXIE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
